overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic urban environment featuring covered walkways with digital billboards, neon-lit commercial areas, and open city streets with moderate vehicle traffic and pedestrians. The scene transitions from sheltered underpasses to open sidewalks with prominent graffiti and towering futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered urban walkway toward street intersection

notable_agents.action: man carrying duffel bag walking toward the camera

entered.detail: industrial metal roofing structure covering the pedestrian walkway
multiple illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the left wall
large cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban walkway with industrial metal roofing and concrete support pillars. Digital advertisement screens illuminate the left wall as the camera walks forward toward a street intersection. A pedestrian carrying a bag approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway underpass with vehicle traffic

events.description: camera turns 90 degrees right to observe passing traffic on the multi-lane street
maroon van and green military-style truck drive past on the street

agents.ego_description: standing at the edge of covered walkway watching vehicles pass by on the street

notable_agents.action: maroon compact van driving along the street
green military-style truck with multiple wheels driving past

entered.detail: large screen displaying cyberpunk-themed advertisement with white text

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to face the street, revealing moderate traffic flow including a distinctive maroon van and military-style truck. The viewpoint remains sheltered under the covered walkway while observing the multi-lane road. A large digital billboard displaying cyberpunk-themed content is visible across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street with neon-lit bar front

events.description: camera turns forward and begins walking along the street level past parked vehicles
entering area with prominent pink and red neon lighting from bar signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the street level past parked vehicles and neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: commercial establishment with prominent pink neon signage and dark facade
rusted brown vintage sedan parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along the street, passing a parked brown sedan and entering a darker commercial area illuminated by vibrant pink and red neon lights from a bar front. The environment remains covered overhead while featuring distinct cyberpunk aesthetic elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk with digital billboards and elevated highway

events.description: exiting covered neon area into open daylight sidewalk with clear sky visible
approaching pedestrians walking along the sidewalk in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along open sidewalk with large digital advertisements on the left and street traffic on the right

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking toward the camera
child in red pants walking alongside an adult

entered.detail: large curved wall covered with multiple digital advertisement screens
multi-level highway overpass with concrete supports
green metal railing separating sidewalk from the street
tall palm trees visible beyond the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions dramatically from the neon-lit covered area to a bright open sidewalk with full sky visibility. Large digital billboards cover the left wall while an elevated highway structure and palm trees dominate the right side. The camera passes several pedestrians walking in the opposite direction along the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with graffiti-covered wall and approaching crowd

events.description: graffiti becomes prominent on the left wall with green stylized lettering
passing through group of pedestrians walking toward the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk passing pedestrians and approaching a larger crowd ahead

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians including man with gold chains walking toward camera
blonde woman in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: dark wall covered with large green and white graffiti tags and artwork
tall industrial tower with antennae and structural elements rising above the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a graffiti-covered wall on the left with prominent green stylized lettering. The camera continues along the open sidewalk, passing through a group of pedestrians including a man with distinctive gold chains. A futuristic industrial tower rises in the background beyond the elevated highway as the camera approaches more pedestrians ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered industrial walkway into a bright, open futuristic cityscape. It begins beneath a metal roof and concrete pillars, moving past digital advertisement screens and an oncoming pedestrian toward a street intersection. As the camera turns right to observe a maroon van and military truck on the road, the view shifts forward into a darker commercial zone saturated with vibrant pink and red neon lights from a bar front. The scene then transitions dramatically from the covered neon area to a sunlit open sidewalk, where the view expands to reveal an elevated highway, palm trees, and towering digital billboards. Finally, the camera glides past graffiti-covered walls and a crowd of pedestrians, including a man in gold chains, as a futuristic industrial tower rises in the distance.
